body.title: Remove hand-wired emit() calls from pe_chain, ops, scope_guard
body.result: removed all emit() call sites from pe_chain, ops, scope_guard; emit.py marked deprecated (prune_emissions still used)
body.description:
The explicit emit() calls added to pe_chain.py (hypothesize_fail/pass), ops.py (goal_adopt/goal_complete), and scope_guard.py (escalate_high/pass) on 2026-05-23 are a stopgap. Once T-igorbase-migrate-to-diagnosticbase lands, every log call in those files automatically produces a JSON file via the DiagnosticBase sink.

Remove: the try/except emit() blocks in pe_chain.pe_hypothesize, ops.goal_adopt, ops.goal_close, scope_guard.run_scope_guard. Keep the existing log.info() calls — those become the source of truth once the loguru sink is live.

Also remove lab/claudecode/emit.py (or deprecate it) — the DiagnosticBase sink replaces it.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/tools/pe_chain.py, wild_igor/igor/tools/ops.py, wild_igor/igor/tools/scope_guard.py, lab/claudecode/emit.py
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** Removal only — no new behavior.
**Test plan:** pytest suite passes unchanged. Confirm no emit() calls remain in the three files.
